title: Dice
tagline: Set a target, roll over or under it. Higher risk, higher payout.
mechanic: A roll lands uniformly in [0, 100). You choose a target and direction; payout = RTP ÷ win-chance. Every target has the same expected value, so the slider only trades frequency for size.
showcases: SimpleMath play() with client params (target + direction)
the same fair engine as Limbo, framed as a probability
mathTest: RTP is independent of target and direction — sweep them with --compare and the measured RTP stays at 0.99.
